log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kor — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kor — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kor — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Kor — Winged Striker HP: 53/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Kor — Winged Striker HP: 36/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Kor — Winged Striker HP: 23/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kor — Winged Striker --- HP: 23/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Kor — Winged Striker --- HP: 23/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.

══ ROUND 6 ══

→ Kor — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
